about.title: About This Site
about.subtitle: Your go-to English resource for travel in China — written by people who actually live here
about.offerSubtitle: Everything you need for a smooth, unforgettable China trip
about.ctaSubtitle: Dive into our city guides and build an itinerary that fits your style.
about.missionP1: China is enormous. It's also endlessly fascinating — 5,000 years of history, dozens of cuisines, and landscapes that stretch from tropical islands to snow-capped mountains. But for first-time visitors, figuring out how to navigate it all can feel overwhelming.
about.missionP2: That's where we come in. We're a team of travel writers and long-term residents based across China — from Beijing to Chengdu to Xi'an and beyond. Every guide is written from firsthand experience: we've walked the streets, eaten the food, gotten lost, and figured out the shortcuts so you don't have to.
about.missionP3: Whether you're here for the Terracotta Warriors, a Sichuan hot pot adventure, or a quiet moment with the pandas, we want to help you plan a trip that's authentic, stress-free, and uniquely yours.
about.f1Desc: Comprehensive guides for every major destination — attractions, food, itineraries, and local intel.
about.f2Desc: Honest accounts and practical tips from people who've actually been there.
about.f3Desc: From street-side stalls to century-old restaurants — the real flavors of each city.
about.f4Desc: Day-by-day plans you can follow directly, even if it's your first time in China.
about.f5Desc: Transport, accommodation, and cultural tips to keep your trip running smoothly.
about.f6Desc: Clear, conversational English with the context you need — no insider assumptions.

footer.desc: Your trusted English-language guide to travel in China. We share on-the-ground experience from popular cities and hidden corners alike, so you can travel with confidence.
footer.copyright: © {year} Middle Kingdom Wanderlust | Travel guides for the curious explorer
